page_content:
Formerly: KNES160N.

KNES182 Soccer (1 Credit)

Provides students with a comprehensive overview of the sport by integrating fundamental and beginning soccer skills with a historical appreciation for and current cultural importance of the sport. Students will learn the rules of soccer, basic soccer-specific training activities and use their understanding of rules and concepts in game related activities Restriction: Must be in a major within the SPHL-Kinesiology department. Credit Only Granted for. KNES182 or KNES152N.
